# Yes365 Car Rentals

> Toyota hybrid car rentals for Uber and DiDi drivers in Sydney, Australia. Unlimited kilometres, rideshare insurance included, full maintenance covered. Pick up in Tempe — on the road within 24 hours.

Yes365 rents Toyota hybrid vehicles exclusively to Uber and DiDi drivers in Sydney. Every rental includes unlimited KMs, rideshare-specific comprehensive insurance, full service and maintenance, and 24/7 roadside assistance. Foreign licences accepted.

## Fleet

- Toyota Camry 50 Hybrid: from $200/week — Uber X eligible
- Toyota Corolla Hatchback Hybrid: from $250/week — Uber X eligible
- Toyota Camry 70 Hybrid: from $300/week — Uber X and Uber Comfort eligible
- Toyota RAV4 Hybrid SUV: from $350/week — Uber X and Uber Comfort eligible

## Location

2 Holbeach Ave, Tempe NSW 2044, Australia. 10 minutes from Sydney Airport.

Mon–Fri 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM · Sat 9:00 AM – 4:00 PM · Sun closed (24/7 emergency line).

## Contact

Phone / WhatsApp: +61 456 555 415
Email: info@yes365.au
